condition_specific: exposure-related cancer — cancer caused by a known carcinogen to which an individual is at risk for occupational exposure (as recognized by IARC or NIOSH)
filing_deadline_notes: Former employee must have terminated employment not more than 60 months (5 years) before diagnosis; individual must be either actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months earlier at time of diagnosis.
notes: Applies to full-time employees of state or political subdivision. Tobacco exclusion: chapter does not apply to any individual who used tobacco products in any form in the 5 years before diagnosis. At time of diagnosis: must be actively employed OR have terminated employment not more than 60 months earlier. Presumption is rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related heart or lung disease — disease or impairment of cardiovascular system caused by occupational exposure
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Full-time firefighters only. Tobacco exclusion: chapter does not apply to individuals who used tobacco in the 5 years before diagnosis. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related lung disease — disease or impairment of respiratory system caused by occupational exposure
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Full-time firefighters only. Tobacco exclusion applies (no tobacco use in 5 years before diagnosis). Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related Parkinson's disease — caused by a toxin or head trauma known to increase risk for Parkinson's disease
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Parkinson's disease explicitly added as a presumptive condition (IC 5-10-15-5.5 added by P.L.59-2009). Must be caused by toxin or head trauma known to increase Parkinson's risk AND to which individual is at risk for occupational exposure. Tobacco exclusion applies. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related cancer — cancer caused by a known carcinogen to which an individual is at risk for occupational exposure
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Applies to full-time emergency medical services providers as defined in IC 16-41-10-1. Tobacco exclusion: no tobacco use in the 5 years before diagnosis. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related heart or lung disease — disease or impairment of cardiovascular system
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Full-time EMS providers. Tobacco exclusion applies. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related lung disease — disease or impairment of respiratory system
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Full-time EMS providers. Tobacco exclusion applies. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Full-time EMS providers. Tobacco exclusion applies. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related cancer — cancer caused by a known carcinogen to which an individual is at risk for occupational exposure
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Applies to full-time members of a police department as defined in IC 36-8-1-9. Tobacco exclusion: no tobacco use in the 5 years before diagnosis. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related heart or lung disease — disease or impairment of cardiovascular system
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Full-time law enforcement. Tobacco exclusion applies. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: exposure-related lung disease — disease or impairment of respiratory system
filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Full-time law enforcement. Tobacco exclusion applies. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

filing_deadline_notes: Must be actively employed or have terminated not more than 60 months before diagnosis.
notes: Full-time law enforcement. Tobacco exclusion applies. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: mental illness / mental health disability (including PTSD)
notes: Applies to 1977 Fund members (firefighters under IC 36-8-8). Mental health disability treated as Class 1 impairment (same as occupational disease). Mental health disability review panel process: initial 2-year provisional period with required active treatment; panel reevaluates at conclusion; second 2-year provisional period if still impaired; permanent disability after second evaluation if still impaired. Applies to final determinations after December 31, 2012. Employer pays for mental health care during both provisional periods. This is a pension/disability benefit structure, not a WC presumption per se.

condition_specific: mental illness / mental health disability (including PTSD)
notes: Applies to 1977 Fund members (police officers and firefighters under IC 36-8-8). Review panel includes active or retired police officer or firefighter depending on the fund member being evaluated. Same provisional period structure as for firefighters. Employer pays for mental health care during provisional periods.
